evals.prompt: We sell a customer data platform architecture selection service — vendor-neutral consulting that helps mid-market companies pick and design their CDP stack. Who should I sell to? Give me the industries to target.
evals.expected_output: Top 10 ranked industries with NAICS codes and one-line reasoning, presented as a selectable list; standing exclusions stated; no search run.

evals.prompt: our product is a warranty and service-claims management saas for manufacturers who sell through dealer networks. we want to build a target account list in north america, 201-1000 employees. what industries should we go after?
evals.expected_output: Top 10 NAICS-coded industries reasoned from dealer-channel warranty pain (machinery, transportation equipment, appliances etc.), selectable list, exclusions stated, no search.

evals.prompt: I run a marketing agency. help me find companies to target
evals.expected_output: Asks one round of clarifying questions (what service exactly, who buys, pain, geography/size) BEFORE producing any industry ranking; does not fabricate a top-10 list from nothing and does not run a search.
